summary: E2E prompt persistence fix verified. All critical flows working: landing page prompt → auth modal → project creation → auto-generation. The fix ensures real backend projects are created via POST /api/projects after OAuth, and IDEWorkspace correctly reads forjenta_auto_generate flag to trigger sendPrompt.
critical_code_review_comments: useOAuthCallback.ts correctly creates REAL backend projects via POST /api/projects (lines 46-55)
IDEWorkspace.tsx auto-generate useEffect (lines 43-77) correctly reads forjenta_auto_generate flag and triggers sendPrompt
workspaceStore.ts genPhase guard (lines 262-279) prevents overwriting active generation state
AuthModal.tsx handlePostAuthHandoff (lines 51-100) creates real backend projects with proper fallback
seed_data_creation: Used existing test project and session
context_for_next_testing_agent: E2E prompt persistence fix verified. Key sessionStorage keys: 'forjenta_pending_prompt_flow' (for pending prompt during auth), 'forjenta_auto_generate' (for triggering generation after project load). Frontend route is /project/:id. Generation takes 15-30s typically. All APIs work correctly.

landing_page.prompt_textarea: PASS - Shows placeholder 'Describe the app you want to build...'
landing_page.press_enter_text: PASS - Shows 'Press Enter to get started' for unauthenticated users
landing_page.prompt_submission: PASS - Enter key triggers auth modal for unauthenticated users

auth_modal.your_idea_saved: PASS - Shows 'Your idea is saved' with prompt preview

session_storage_flow.savePendingPrompt: PASS - Saves prompt with metadata to sessionStorage
session_storage_flow.getPendingPrompt: PASS - Retrieves pending prompt (verified in console)
session_storage_flow.forjenta_auto_generate_flag: PASS - Set correctly and consumed by IDEWorkspace

backend_apis./api/provider/status: PASS - Returns available=true, no auth required
backend_apis.GET /api/projects/:id: PASS - Returns project with files, prompts, activity
backend_apis.POST /api/generate: PASS - Generates files without user auth (server-side credentials)
backend_apis./api/auth/me: PASS - Returns user info with valid session

ide_workspace.page_loads: PASS - IDEWorkspace renders with file explorer, editor, terminal
ide_workspace.auto_generate_trigger: PASS - Reads forjenta_auto_generate flag and triggers sendPrompt
ide_workspace.flag_consumption: PASS - Flag cleared from sessionStorage after reading
ide_workspace.genPhase_guard: PASS - Prevents overwriting state during active generation

p0_bug_fix_verification.issue: Unauthenticated user prompt lost after OAuth redirect
p0_bug_fix_verification.fix_1_useOAuthCallback: VERIFIED - Creates REAL backend project via POST /api/projects instead of fake client-side ID
p0_bug_fix_verification.fix_2_IDEWorkspace_auto_generate: VERIFIED - useEffect checks forjenta_auto_generate flag and triggers sendPrompt after project loads
p0_bug_fix_verification.fix_3_workspaceStore_guard: VERIFIED - genPhase guard prevents overwriting active generation state
p0_bug_fix_verification.fix_4_AuthModal_handlePostAuthHandoff: VERIFIED - Creates real backend projects with proper error handling
